name: Moyer Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Moyer Pickleball Complex in Salem, VA! There are 13 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Salem Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Salem Family YMCA in Salem, VA! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Salem/Oakey Field
description: Salem/Oakey Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salem, VA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Stonegate Swim Club
description: Stonegate Swim Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salem, VA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
